title: In Brasília-DF, a woman reported continuous UFO sightings in 3 months [1991]
excerpt: APRIL 19th, 1991. Time: 01:35. Duration: not determined. A woman in the Asa Sul region, in Brasília, Distrito Federal, reported continuous sightings of UFOs that occurred for about 3 months. text_preview: APRIL 19th, 1991. Time: 01:35. Duration: not determined. A woman in the Asa Sul region, in Brasília, Distrito Federal, reported continuous sightings of UFOs that occurred for about 3 months. According to the witness, the last sighting, reported in this file, took place “approximately 16km from the end of Asa Sul”, in the “West position”. The three UFOs were large, flashing red and blue lights alternately, and remained stationary most of the time observed. Complementary data from COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command]: “02:30P: a new R/173 call was made and the same [reporting witness]
summary: A woman in Brasília's Asa Sul reported three large stationary UFOs flashing red and blue lights, observed repeatedly over three months ending April 1991.
